name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America on Woodforest Blvd in Houston, TX offers same-day payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America's Houston location sits at 14658 Woodforest Blvd, a busy commercial corridor on the east side of Houston, TX. The storefront is conveniently accessible during extended business hours—open Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 3 PM, and closed Sundays. This Woodforest Blvd branch serves the surrounding Houston neighborhoods with straightforward walk-in service.

The Houston location specializes in fast payday loans and auto title loans, designed for customers who need immediate cash. If you have questions about application requirements or current terms, call +1 713-451-7002 to speak with the staff directly. They're available during posted hours to answer queries and process applications.

For Houston residents needing quick cash before payday, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and a recent pay stub to this Woodforest Blvd location. Payday loans are short-term solutions, so consider whether the terms fit your budget. The Houston location prioritizes fast approvals—many applicants walk out the same day.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for payday and installment loans
High loan approval rates with minimal credit requirements
Multiple application channels: in-store, online, and phone pre-qualification
Extended business hours (10am–6pm weekdays, 9am–4pm Saturday) for convenience
Bilingual staff and customer service (Spanish-language support stated)
Higher loan limits with installment loans ($1,000) versus payday loans ($500)
Title loans up to $25,000 for consumers with vehicle equity
4.9-star customer rating based on 125,454 reviews with positive testimonials about staff helpfulness
cons: APR rates not disclosed on location page; payday/installment loans typically carry 300%+ APR (industry standard), making them extremely expensive
Short repayment terms (2–4 weeks for payday loans) create high default and debt-cycling risk
Title loans require surrendering vehicle title as collateral, risking repossession if payment missed
Designed for emergency short-term use, not suitable for long-term debt solutions or building credit
No mention of credit-building or credit reporting benefits; loans do not improve credit scores
best_for: Workers needing bridge cash before payday with reliable income to repay within 2–4 weeks
Vehicle owners with equity seeking larger emergency loans ($2,000–$25,000) and ability to repay without risking car repossession
Consumers in Jacksonville's North Edgewood area preferring in-person application and immediate cash access
Spanish-language speakers seeking bilingual lending services in Jacksonville
diagnosis: Advance America is best for workers facing legitimate cash emergencies who can repay within 2–4 weeks and prefer immediate in-person service. The primary caveat: these loans carry triple-digit APRs and should be treated as last-resort emergency funding, not regular borrowing solutions; consumers risk debt cycles or vehicle repossession without careful evaluation of repayment capacity.
services: Payday loans ($100–$500, 2–4 week terms, online or in-store)
Installment loans ($100–$1,000, multiple payment options, online or in-store)
Title loans ($2,000–$25,000, vehicle collateral-based, in partnership with LoanCenter)
In-store application and loan closing at physical locations
Loan application pre-visit guidance and required documentation list
